emptyHint: You have no vehicles yet. Add your first car to see metrics and charts.
garageHint: Register models, photos, setups and lap times. The dashboard fills with charts automatically.
pendingReviewHint: Cars without maintenance within the configured threshold.
upcomingMaintenanceDesc: Next due date within 7 days (based on each vehicle's last record).
kpiDesc: Fleet, investment, Digital / Museum / Workshop classification and track activity at a glance.
sectionFleetDistDesc: Brand, store, vehicle type and modified vs stock ratio.
sectionRevalDesc: Highest increment per vehicle, performance by type and lane comparison.
sectionInvestmentDesc: Invested value over time and cost/component rankings.

actionBlocks.loadError: Could not load suggested actions. Try reloading the page.
actionBlocks.title: Pending items & alerts
actionBlocks.desc: Quick links to what usually needs your attention. The usual-circuit block considers «no recent session» when you have not run there for more than <1>{{days}} days</1> (adjust in <2>Settings</2>).
actionBlocks.noPendingCompetitions: No competitions with pending timings (with participants).
actionBlocks.allTimingsComplete: All competitions with participants have complete timings.
actionBlocks.addTimingsHint: Add sessions in Timings to automatically detect the circuit you use most.
actionBlocks.staleAtCircuit: At <1>{{name}}</1>, these have not had a session for more than {{days}} days:
actionBlocks.allRecentAtCircuit: At <1>{{name}}</1>, all cars that have run there have a recent session (last {{days}} days).
actionBlocks.noLowStock: No critical spare parts below minimum (motor, guide, gears, tires…).

brand.title: Distribution by Brand
brand.empty: No data available to show brand distribution

store.title: Distribution by Store
store.empty: No data available to show store distribution

performanceByType.title: Performance by Type
performanceByType.empty: No vehicles with recorded lap times to show performance by type

investmentTimeline.title: Collection Evolution
investmentTimeline.empty: Not enough data to show collection evolution

laneComparison.title: Lane Comparison
laneComparison.noteBody: Each lane uses the best time of each vehicle run on that lane (same lap count per row). A car may appear on multiple lanes with different times.
laneComparison.compareBody: The «Difference» column compares the same car and lap count between this lane and the reference lane.
laneComparison.refLaneBody: Used as the baseline for comparison. Lane 1 is the reference when available.
laneComparison.onlyOneLaneBody: Only one lane is available; comparison is not possible.
laneComparison.cannotCalculateBody: Differences cannot be calculated with the available data.
laneComparison.noDataHint: Record sessions in Timings to see the lane comparison.
